name: CVin.Bio Agent
description: Professional identity platform and job board. Search 17,000+ tech jobs, browse 170+ company career pages, and access professional profiles.

authentication.credentials: API key via Authorization header for authenticated endpoints. Public endpoints require no auth.

skills.name: Job Search
skills.description: Search 17,000+ tech job listings across 170+ companies. Filter by role, location, company, and job type.
examples: Find remote senior engineer roles at Stripe
Show all open positions at OpenAI
List frontend developer jobs in Europe

skills.name: Professional Profile Lookup
skills.description: View structured professional profiles with work history, education, skills, and contact info.
examples: Find candidates with React and TypeScript skills

skills.name: Research Reports
skills.description: Access data-driven research reports on tech hiring, layoffs, and remote work trends.
examples: What are the top skills in demand?
How many tech layoffs happened in 2025?
